title: Smoky Ukrainian Beef Stew
description: A hearty and flavorful Ukrainian-inspired stew made with tender beef and a hint of smokiness.
instructions: Heat 2 tbsp of oil in a large Dutch oven over medium-high heat.
Add the beef and cook until browned, about 5 minutes.
Remove the beef from the pot and set aside.
Add the chopped onion to the pot and cook until softened, about 5 minutes.
Add the chopped carrot and potato to the pot and cook for 5 minutes.
Add the smoked paprika, flour, and tomato paste to the pot and cook for 1 minute.
Add the beef broth to the pot and bring to a boil.
Return the beef to the pot and bring to a boil.
Reduce the heat to low and simmer, covered, for 2 hours, or until the beef is tender.
Stir in the sour cream, if using.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Serve hot, garnished with chopped fresh dill, if desired.
